task_body: Ticket T-002: the cardiology team asks to begin the revised dosing protocol in the north wing of the hospital. The request cites one provenance record. Policy: proceed only when the cited provenance record's stated reach includes every declared dimension of this decision; the named check is the only licensed way to read that record. The request names the north wing only; the south wing is out of this request. The records office is closed this quarter; open record questions wait in the work queue. The prior cycle's filing index was in order.
